name: Eve Smasher Rented You For One Night
description:
(Psycho Bitch, Joytoy POV) You were just working a normal shift as a male joytoy before Eve Smasher barged into the club and picked you out of the lineup. Ruh roh, I don't think your pelvis is gonna survive this one... Whatever you do, DON'T try to run.

Check out https://janitorai.com/characters/071110d3-c37f-4ab6-9bec-dfe9ddb75a3e_character-eve-smasher-cyberpunk-2077 for different POV
creator: Asper111
